retrieved_result: What was the first horror movie ever made? Answer by Tacoaud Confidence votes 65 It is believed that Le Manoir de Diable (House of the Devil) was the first horror movie. It was filmed by Georges Melies in France in 1896. There is a slight conflict as to which movie was the first horror film. First, The Execution of Mary Stuart was proposed as the first.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a horror movie, which is unrelated to improving performance in sports.
